Interface ITenantStore

Provides persistent storage and retrieval of TenantInfo records. Implement this to back tenants with a database, configuration file, or any other source.

Namespace: AspNetCore.Multitenancy
Assembly: AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Core.dll
Syntax
public interface ITenantStore

Methods

| Edit this page View Source

Adds a new tenant to the store.

Declaration

CancellationToken cancellationToken
Returns

Returns all tenants known to the store.

GetTenantAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Retrieves a tenant by its unique identifier. Returns null if not found.

Declaration
Task<TenantInfo?> GetTenantAsync(string tenantId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

Type Name Description
string tenantId
